name: Nesting Burrows
window: After you produce 1 or more infantry:
windowEffect: You may place up to 2 of those units on your faction sheet. Those units are captured.

name: Necrogenesis
window: Once per ground combat, after 1 of your opponent's units are destroyed:
windowEffect: You may place 1 of your captured infantry from your faction sheet on that planet.

name: Feeding Frenzy
permanentEffect: Apply +1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls during ground combat on a planet that is in a nebula.

name: Swarm
window: Once per action, during invasion on a planet that contains your units:
windowEffect: You may resolve ground combat on that planet even if it does not contain another player's ground forces.
